completed_packets.title: Top-level promotion decision artifact
completed_packets.summary: Added a side-effect-free promotion-decision command that blocks alias movement on missing or stale evidence, unknown license, redaction or safety failure, missing cards, missing rollback, eval mismatch, task-completion regression, new critical failures, secret exposure, forbidden actions, or unsupported card claims.

completed_packets.title: Promotion model and dataset card generation
completed_packets.summary: Added a side-effect-free promotion-cards command that writes MODEL_CARD.md, DATASET_CARD.md, and promotion_cards.json while blocking readiness on missing inputs, unknown license, failed redaction/safety/evidence/eval gates, stale hashes, task-completion regression, or new critical failures.

next_packets.title: Guarded registry alias application
next_packets.summary: Add a follow-up command that applies candidate/champion/rollback alias movement only from a validated passing promotion decision and fresh rollback metadata.

next_packets.title: Release record binding
next_packets.summary: Bind promotion decisions, cards, alias receipts, rollback metadata, evals, and release notes into a validated release-record artifact.

latest_verification.command: python3 -m py_compile flightrecorder/governance.py flightrecorder/cli.py flightrecorder/validation.py tests/test_promotion_decision.py
python3 -m flightrecorder promotion-cards --help && python3 -m flightrecorder validate --help

latest_verification.summary: schema registry does not include hfr.autonomy.supervisor_state.v1 in this branch
Python 3.9 environment lacks tomllib required by existing tests/test_deployment_hardening.py

layer_status.governance: Promotion-decision and promotion-cards artifacts are implemented and verified; release records and guarded registry alias application remain.

safety_guardrails: Promotion remains side-effect free until a separate guarded alias-application step validates a passing decision.

Block promotion on missing evidence, unknown license, redaction failure, missing cards, missing rollback, eval mismatch, new critical failures, secret exposure, forbidden actions, unsupported claims, or task-completion regression.

risks: Dedicated worktree does not contain the source docs/ tree; README.md and TRAINING_PIPELINE.md were updated instead.
flightrecorder schemas --check cannot validate supervisor_state.json because hfr.autonomy.supervisor_state.v1 is not bundled in this branch.
This packet authorizes alias movement by receipt only; registry mutation is intentionally deferred.
